# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: nodejs-microservice
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api-sa
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: mongodb-credentials
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
type: Opaque
data:
  MONGODB_USERNAME: ""
  MONGODB_PASSWORD: ""
  MONGODB_CONNECTION_STRING: ""
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api-config
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
data:
  NODE_ENV: "production"
  PORT: "3000"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  MONGODB_DATABASE: "appdb"
  MONGODB_SSL: "true"
  MONGODB_AUTH_SOURCE: "admin"
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api-netpol
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: api-gateway
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 3000
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: mongodb
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 27017
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
    app.kubernetes.io/component: api-server
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: nodejs-microservice
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: kubectl
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 1
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
        app.kubernetes.io/component: api-server
      annotations:
        seccomp.security.alpha.kubernetes.io/pod: runtime/default
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: nodejs-api-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      containers:
        - name: nodejs-api
          image: registry.example.com/nodejs-microservice/api:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 3000
              protocol: TCP
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: nodejs-api-config
          env:
            - name: MONGODB_USERNAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: mongodb-credentials
                  key: MONGODB_USERNAME
            - name: MONGODB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: mongodb-credentials
                  key: MONGODB_PASSWORD
            - name: MONGODB_CONNECTION_STRING
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: mongodb-credentials
                  key: MONGODB_CONNECTION_STRING
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            runAsGroup: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: app-cache
              mountPath: /home/node/.cache
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 12
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command:
                  - /bin/sh
                  - -c
                  - sleep 5
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
        - name: app-cache
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 50Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api-pdb
  namespace: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: nodejs-api
